case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. A. C. WALLER

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WALLER, A. C. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-2010

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2011, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2010 CONTINUED TO FEB-02-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-03-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLER, A. C. $3,040.37 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,040.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ZIMMERMAN, HALLIE N. SUBSTITUTED FOR JACOBS, KURTISS A AS ATTORNEY FOR DISCOVER BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
